Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Staying This Action As To Defendants Elizabeth Pappy And Maxwell Blum
Off Calendar Feb-27-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Pamela Bobowski for David C. Gutekunst, Plaintiff (via Zoom).
Justin Fields for Elizabeth Pappy and Maxwell Blum, Defendants.

Ms. Bobowski contested the court's tentative decision. After hearing oral arguments, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS ELIZABETH PAPPY AND MAXWELL BLUM'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAYING THIS ACTION AS TO DEFENDANTS ELIZABETH PAPPY AND MAXWELL BLUM is GRANTED. Claims against Elizabeth Pappy and Maxwell Blum shall proceed in arbitration and are stayed in the Court action. The remainder of the action shall proceed in this Court. Plaintiff's unauthorized sur-reply is stricken.

Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Staying This Action As To Defendants Elizabeth Pappy And Maxwell Blum
Off Calendar Jan-16-2025 Continued To Jan-24-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ELIZABETH PAPPY , AN INDIVIDUAL; AND/OR AGENT OF BURKE, WILLIAMS, SORENSEN, LLP, MAXWELL BLUM Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Staying This Action As To Defendants Elizabeth Pappy And Maxwell Blum

Appearances (by Zoom):
Pamela Bobowski, Esq. 650-504-1995 Trusted Law Corporation for Plaintiff.
Justin Fields, Esq. 415-957-3000 Duane Morris LLP for Defendant

ARGUED. Plaintiff contests/clarifies the tentative ruling. The Court announces the tentative ruling and shares its comments. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
